name: Weis-Shirokov Corollary 5 (Multi-constraint face dimension bound)
source: S. Weis and M.E. Shirokov, arXiv:2003.14302, Corollary 5. LOCAL: references/weis_shirokov_2021.pdf. STRING MATCH VERIFIED: 'Corollary 5. Let l ∈ N... If the face F_{K_u^s}(x) of K_u^s generated by x has dimension m ∈ N0, then the dimension of the face F_K(x) of K generated by x belongs to the set {m, m+1, ..., m+l}.'
